description: A screenshot of a social-media post from an account labeled 'Donald J. Trump' with the handle '@realDonaldTrump' and a profile picture showing a face overlaid with a U.S. flag pattern. The black-on-white text states that law enforcement requested the group leave the premises, that a press conference will be given from the White House Press Briefing Room, that the First Lady, Vice President and Cabinet are in perfect condition, and that the event will be rescheduled, signed 'President DONALD J. TRUMP'.
notable_text: Donald J. Trump; @realDonaldTrump; Law Enforcement has requested that we leave the premises; White House Press Briefing Room
